title: Research Officer, Genomics
description:
MiRXES is a Singapore-headquartered molecular diagnostic company with R&D, manufacturing, and clinical lab operations in Singapore, USA, Japan, and China. We specialize in microRNA technologies and the development, manufacturing, and provision of diagnostic test kits and clinical services. Our mission is to enable early disease detection and provide insights for better patient care by harnessing the power of microRNA to augment traditional testing. Our vision is to be the world’s leading developer and provider of accurate, actionable, and affordable microRNA-powered diagnostic tests.

Job Location: Neuros


Job Summary

The clinical lab is looking for a Research Officer, Genomics to support ultra-high throughput sequencing projects, such as precision medicine and population genomics. The ideal candidate would be well-rounded with molecular biology techniques and have a passion for implementing state-of-art technologies to serve the general population.


Roles and Responsibilities

  • Receive training on spatial genomics sample prep, library prep training, as well as ultra-high throughput NGS sequencing workflows
  • Work together with Research Scientist on assay development in areas such as spatial genomics and single cell technologies
  • Perform sample QC, prepare sequencing libraries, and perform ultra-high throughput sequencing according to SOP for operation projects
  • Analyze sequencing data and report results in a timely manner.
  • Assist in troubleshooting and ensuring proper documentation of all processes
  • Interact with bioinformaticians and evaluate bioinformatics output
  • Maintain lab equipment & documentation in accordance with quality requirements.
  • Supervise and train junior staff
  • Other ad-hoc projects as required
  • May need to perform shift duties as required


Desired Skills & Competencies

  • Degree in Life Sciences or a related field with minimal 5 years of related working experience
  • Meticulous attention to detail is the key
  • Hand-on experience with with spatial genomics andrelated technologies is highly desirable
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills
  • Have a positive, proactive, can-do attitude
  • Keen to learn and good team player
  • Comfortable with shift work is a plus


This position is based in Singapore.

We appreciate your interest in the above-mentioned position, however, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Be part of the team delivering world-leading multi-cancer early detection. MiRXES is a Singapore-headquartered biotechnology company that translates research discoveries to deliver world-leading multi-cancer early detection. We are Asia-centered, starting with Southeast Asia, and have global ambitions. We have research, development, manufacturing, and clinical diagnostic operations in Singapore, USA, Japan, and China.


Our versatile platform technology and capabilities have broad applications in the discovery of biomarkers and diagnosis of diseases. We started with cancer, but are also addressing unmet clinical needs in cardiovascular, metabolic, and infectious diseases.
postedCompany.name: MIRXES LAB PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
